payload:
BitNet-SOLE Research Loop — ternary base + ternary adapters, all local.

ARCHITECTURE: BitNet-SOLE — BitNet-2B-4T ternary base + ternary LoRA adapters (QAT with STE) + 1/N composition.
STATE: Read .ralph/current_direction.md for active phase. Read HYPOTHESES.yml (bitnet section) for full roadmap.
CONTEXT: VISION.md, FINDINGS.md, references/BITNET_SOLE_RESEARCH.md, plans/concurrent-swimming-tarjan.md.

SCALE CONSTRAINT: micro only. Everything runs LOCALLY on Apple Silicon via MLX. No RunPod. ... [truncated, 2717 chars total]

exp_bitnet_scale_n15 KILLED (K3 only): N=15 composition ratio 6.12x (1.78x scaling from N=5, K1 PASS), |cos|=0.0011 (K2 PASS), but medical domain degraded +15% under 1/N dilution (K3 KILL). Key insight: dilution not interference — confirms per-input routing mandatory for production SOLE. 31min, /bin/zsh.

exp_bitnet_scale_n15: REVISE with 5 fixes — (1) acknowledge composition ratio metric limitation, report composed/base ratio as primary, (2) analyze medical-health domain overlap, (3) report K3 for all 15 domains not just original 5, (4) fix HYPOTHESES.yml graph inconsistency (killed node blocking N=25), (5) add composed/base ratio 0.938 to summary table. Core finding sound: ternary composition scales to N=15 with predictable dilution.

exp_bitnet_scale_n15 REVISED: 5 fixes applied — composed/base ratio 0.938 promoted as primary metric, medical-health overlap analyzed (dilution not interference), all 15 domains K3 reported, status changed killed→supported (K3 uniform-weighting caveat), unblocks scale_n25 + basefree_exploration. No re-run needed.

exp_bitnet_scale_n15 SUPPORTED: composed/base 0.938, K1 PASS, K2 PASS (9x margin), K3 uniform-weighting caveat only. Adversarial review PROCEED (post-REVISE, 5 fixes). Unblocks scale_n25 + basefree_exploration.

exp_bitnet_sole_vs_monolithic SUPPORTED: SOLE routed wins 4/5 domains (-5.8% avg PPL vs monolithic). K1 PASS (mono wins 1/5=20%). Reverses FP16 result. Creative writing sole mono win (+5.5%). Single seed caveat.

exp_bitnet_sole_vs_monolithic SUPPORTED: SOLE routed wins 4/5 domains (-5.8% avg PPL vs monolithic). Adversarial review PROCEED. Reverses FP16 d=32 result. Creative writing sole mono win. Single seed caveat.

exp_bitnet_serving_path KILLED. K1 FAIL: LoTA-QAF lossless merge erases adapters (0% weight flips, delta 116x below grid threshold). K2 PASS (12.8 tok/s, p95=8.3s). K3 PASS (1.69GB). Runtime LoRA (unpacked bf16) is only viable serving path. Architecture pivot needed: drop packed-integer serving assumption.

exp_bitnet_serving_path: K1 FAIL confirmed (0% ternary flips, 116x gap). Adversarial review PROCEED. Minor notes: K2/K3 trivially satisfied (merged=base), float merge fp32 deserves follow-up node, STE should have been applied in merge path.
